title: UkeCraft
description: The modpack for The Official BoyWithUke MC Server!
body:
# Official Modpack for mc.boywithuke.uk – **Required to Join**

This modpack boosts performance, enhances graphics, and delivers a smooth, immersive Minecraft experience on our server. It’s a tuned blend of [BigChadGuys Minus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bcgm), [Fabulously Optimised](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and [Create Astra](https://modrinth.com/modpack/createastra) with extra customizations to suit our unique world.
## Key Features:

- **Improved** performance & graphics

- **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** for seamless in-game communication

- **[Create Mod](https://createmod.com/)** with most notable addons

- **Enhanced** world generation with extra structures

- **Inter-planetary travel**: fly to different planets

- **Custom music** discs featuring BoyWithUke!

### To be continued...
